strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience spanning Node.js, TypeScript, React, and multiple backend languages
Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching the AI agent requirement
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, founded testing workshops, built Fluent-Asserts and Trial test runner)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin in the primary stack
Limited evidence of PostgreSQL or cloud-native Kubernetes/AWS depth beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may not transfer directly to the required Java/Kotlin secondary stack
response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ years requirement with deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience (Optilyz, RIDE, WatchUp) and directly relevant AI-agent/MCP work at re:cinq. Testing expertise is exceptional (TDD practitioner, built test frameworks, taught Selenium courses), satisfying the Vitest/Jest competency even without explicit Vitest mention. MongoDB, Docker, Git, and AWS CDK are evidenced; however, Nest.js, Kotlin, and Kubernetes depth are not explicitly stated, and the secondary-stack Java/Kotlin experience is dated. Architecture and craftsmanship signals are strong (founder of GISCollective, multi-platform delivery).
